morning.name: Morning Launch
morning.description: Start the day with intention and energy. Complete before checking email or social media.

steps.action: Wake up at consistent time (no snooze)
Drink a full glass of water
Take Vitamin D with breakfast
Meditate for 5-10 minutes
Review Life Admin morning briefing
Identify top 3 priorities for the day
Get dressed and prepare for the day

workdayStart.name: Workday Kickoff
workdayStart.description: Transition into work mode. Process inbox and set daily plan.

steps.action: Process email inbox (batch #1)
Review calendar and upcoming commitments
Start first deep work block with top priority

workdayEnd.name: Workday Shutdown
workdayEnd.description: Close out work cleanly so the evening is truly free.

steps.action: Process email inbox (batch #2)
Update task list with tomorrow's top 3
Shut down computer — no more work email tonight

evening.name: Evening Wind-Down
evening.description: Close the day with reflection and preparation for rest.

steps.action: Review Life Admin evening summary
Take Magnesium supplement
Set out clothes and prep items for tomorrow
Read for 20 minutes (physical book, no screens)
Lights out by 10:30pm

sundayReview.name: Weekly Review
sundayReview.description: Comprehensive weekly review following GTD methodology. The most important routine of the week.

steps.action: Gather all loose papers, notes, and digital inboxes
Process all inboxes to zero (email, notes, physical inbox)
Review Life Admin weekly summary (habits, budget, goals)
Review all active projects and their next actions
Check waiting-for items — follow up on anything stale
Review someday/maybe list — promote or demote items
Review calendar for the next 2-4 weeks
Plan next week: schedule deep work blocks and key commitments
Meal plan for the week and create grocery list
Celebrate accomplishments from the past week

saturdayReset.name: Saturday Home Reset
saturdayReset.description: Light home maintenance to keep things running smoothly without a deep clean.

steps.action: Process mail and papers that accumulated during the week
Kitchen: run dishwasher, wipe counters, clean sink, check fridge for expired items
Laundry: start a load, fold and put away any clean laundry
Quick tidy: 10 minutes of putting things back in their place
Trash and recycling: take out if pickup is coming
Check grocery list from Sunday review and shop if needed

budgetReview.name: Monthly Budget Check
budgetReview.description: Review last month's spending, set this month's targets, and check savings progress.

steps.action: Review last month's actual spending vs. budget by category
Identify any categories that went over and why
Update this month's budget targets based on planned activities
Check savings goals progress and projected completion dates
Review upcoming bills and confirm auto-pay is set for fixed expenses

subscriptionAudit.name: Quarterly Subscription Audit
subscriptionAudit.description: Review all active subscriptions and cancel anything not providing value.

steps.action: List every active subscription with monthly cost
Mark each: essential / valuable / nice-to-have / forgotten
Cancel anything in 'forgotten' category
Calculate total monthly savings from cancellations
Redirect savings to a goal
